LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS EMERALD CITY LOFTS BUILDING LLC AND EMERALD CITY LOFTS, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. ON A DEMURRER THE COURT LOOKS SOLELY TO THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT. GIVEN THE POLICY OF LIBERAL CONSTRUCTION, THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS TO SUPPORT THE CLASS ACTION ALLEGATIONS. IN PARTICULAR, IT IS NOT POSSIBLE TO DETERMINE SIMPLY FROM THE ALLEGATIONS THAT COMMON ISSUES DO NOT PREDOMINATE. COMPARE DEFENDANTS' REPLY AT 3 LINE 14 ET SEQ. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEFFREY R. CLUETT OF THE LAW OFFFICES OF ANN RANKIN, TEL. NO.
(510)653-8886 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS EMERALD CITY LOFTS BUILDING LLC AND EMERALD CITY LOFTS, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. On a demurrer the Court looks solely to the face of the complaint. Given the policy of liberal construction, the First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support the class action allegations. In particular, it is not possible to determine simply from the allegations that common issues do not predominate. Compare Defendants' Reply at 3 line 14 et seq. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Curtis Karnow; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/CK)
